creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
I prepared a tarball for the latest version 8.93:
	ftp://ftp.ipt.ru/pub/download/dcraw-8.93.tar.bz2
	You may upload it to ftp://ftp.springdaemons.com/soft/.

Fix: 

WBR
-- 
bsam--QpRokpIdfF1TO3O7h6dGDML0ckNS4jOFK7ssxuM31z0KU33K
